arguments.name: establish_defensive_position
arguments.description: Move to a safe defensive position with good visibility and ready to engage threats

arguments.message: Status update: I've collected all gear (sword, bow, arrows, armor, food). Currently positioned defensively. No threats nearby. Ready to coordinate with Bot1 on patrol or defense strategy.

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created establish_defensive_position and executed it with {"x":10,"z":10,"radius":3}. <DEFENDING>: Moving to (10, 0, 10) and equipped stone_sword.
